title: callitriche heterophylla subsp. bolanderi
intro: Callitriche heterophylla subsp. bolanderi, also known as Bolander's waterwort, is a submerged aquatic plant species found in North America, particularly in freshwater habitats. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Bolander's waterwort include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
